_comment: IAM Policy for the Authenticated Role of a Cognito Identity Pool.
The ${cognito-identity.amazonaws.com:sub} variable is resolved by AWS at request time
using the authenticated user's Identity Pool subject (sub). This makes cross-user
access impossible at the infrastructure level — no application bug can override it.
Attach this policy to the Authenticated Role ARN shown in your Identity Pool settings.
Replace YOUR_BUCKET_NAME with your actual S3 bucket name.

Statement._comment: Explicitly deny GetObject on any key that does NOT belong to this user. Belt-and-suspenders: even if the Allow above is misconfigured, this Deny wins.
